title: Potions & Such
description: New effects, potions and items, stackable potions, a use for the fletching table and new arrow types, a new monster and more!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45281bf07732e5d080e16d1137cc990365fd97f0.png)


Potions & Such aims to improve alchemy and archery by adding new effects, making potions more viable and adding a use to the fletching table as well as new arrow types.

<details>
<summary>Stackable Potions & Potion Loot</summary>

## Stackable Potions
One major downside to potions in vanilla Minecraft is that they occupy far too much space in the inventory. But with this mod installed, all potions (including modded ones) stack up to 8! (up to 3 on v2.0.5 and older)

![3 potions in a stack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ceddd5087b276f0e666e8ee278b0b6e9f9ddb22.png)

Another issue with potions in vanilla is how time-consuming they are to obtain. By the time you can brew potions you have basically no need for them anymore. To fix this, the mod adds potions with random effects to loot chests in your world!

</details>



<details>
<summary>Fletching Table and New Arrow Types</summary>

## Fletching Table and New Arrow Types
The fletching table finally has a use! The fletching table now allows you to craft tipped arrows with any type of potion instead of only lingering potions. You can also craft spectral arrows with arrows and glowstone dust.

![Fletching table being used to craft tipped arrows and spectral arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c8900821f156782cb956c3b2fe9453e4a0dbee1.png)
Additionally, the mod adds 3 new arrow types that you can make in a fletching table: 
- **Tipped Spectral Arrows** can be made with spectral arrows and a potion. Like normal spectral arrows, they affect the hit entity with glowing, while also affecting them with the effect of whatever potion you make them with
- **Explosive Arrows** can be made with an arrow and gunpowder. These will cause a small explosion on impact, damaging and pushing nearby entities, as well as throwing some blocks into the air.
- **Tipped Explosive Arrows** can be made with an explosive arrow and a potion. They have the same properties as explosive arrows. Unlike regular tipped arrows, the arrow affects all entities within the explosion radius, similar to splash potions.

</details>



<details>
<summary>New Effects & Potions</summary>

## New Effects & Potions
The mod adds 5 new effects:
- Recall: Teleports you to your spawnpoint when the effect runs out
- Heartache: Halts natural regeneration
- Attraction: Nearby entities are pulled towards the entity with the effect
- Repulsion: Nearby entities are pushed away from the entity with the effect
- Entropy: Time-based events like fire spread and crop growth are faster around the entity with the effect

![New effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15cbe55ffcb9109e851ee5a29b8f16c4dbbee721.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>New Monster</summary>

The **Alchemist** is a new monster that spawns on the surface during full moons or rarely in caves at any time. Alchemists throw random lingering potions at their target and always drop a random potion, and rarely an **Alchemist's Pouch** and **Pandora's Potion** (See "New Items" Tab).

</details>



<details>
<summary>New Items</summary>

## New Items

### Alchemist's Pouch
The Alchemist's Pouch is a usable item with 64 durability and a 10 second cooldown (Enchantable with Mending and Unbreaking). It has the same attack as the **Alchemist**, throwing a random lingering potion. Can be obtained as a rare drop from the Alchemist.

### Pandora's Potion
Pandora's Potion can be found in chests or as a rare drop from the **Alchemist**. Pandora's Potion grants 4-6 random effects from levels 1-3.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Fletching and Brewing Recipes</summary>
  
## Recipes:
### Potion Recipes:
Splash and lingering variants can be created using gunpowder and dragon's breath.

- Ender Pearl + Awkward Potion = **Potion of Recalling**
- Potion of Recalling + Redstone Dust = **Potion of Long Recalling**
- Potion of Recalling + Glowstone Dust = **Potion of Quick Recalling**
- Compass + Awkward Potion = **Potion of Attraction**
- Potion of Attraction + Glowstone Dust = **Potion of Attraction II**
- Potion of Attraction + Redstone Dust = **Potion of Long Attraction**
- Potion of Repulsion + Copper Ingot = **Potion of Attraction**
- Awkward Potion + Weeping Vines = **Potion of Heartache**
- Potion of Heartache + Redstone Dust = **Potion of Long Heartache**
- Potion of Heartache + Glowstone Dust = **Potion of Strong Heartache**
- Potion of Attraction + Copper Ingot = **Potion of Repulsion**
- Potion of Repulsion + Redstone Dust = **Potion of Long Repulsion**
- Potion of Repulsion + Glowstone Dust = **Potion of Strong Repulsion**
- Awkward Potion + Clock = **Potion of Entropy**
- Potion of Entropy + Redstone Dust = **Potion of Long Entropy**
- Potion of Entropy + Glowstone Dust = **Potion of Strong Entropy**

### Fletching Recipes:
- Arrow + Glowstone Dust = **Spectral Arrow**
- 8x Spectral Arrow + Potion = **8x Tipped Spectral Arrow**
- 8x Arrow + Potion = **8x Tipped Arrow**
- 2x Arrow + Gunpowder = **2x Explosive Arrow**
- 2x Arrow + Potion + Gunpowder = **2x Tipped Explosive Arrow**
- 2x Explosive Arrow + Potion = **2x Tipped Explosive Arrow**

</details>
